hero.title: Predictive Workforce Intelligence for Enterprise Talent Decisions
hero.description: Bring quant-level intelligence to talent decisions — predict hiring success, leadership potential, and workforce outcomes before you invest.

partners.title: Trusted by Global Enterprises
partners.description: Serving leading organizations across 8 major industries worldwide.

features.title: HR Has Become Strategic — Without Strategic Infrastructure
features.subtitle: But most systems were designed for record-keeping — not decision-making.

left.title: Talent decisions rely on:
left.info: HR is no longer just managing talent.
left.description: It is expected to predict it.

items.label: Slow Hiring
items.description: Weeks of back-and-forth shrink to days. Our AI screens, ranks and schedules in minutes, so your best candidates are still excited when you say yes.

items.label: High Costs
items.description: Agency fees, ad spend and admin hours vanish. One subscription cuts total hire-cost up to 60 % while lifting quality of every single recruit.

items.label: Hidden Bias
items.description: Resumes hide talent; data-first assessments strip out gender, age and pedigree bias so the right person—nothing else—wins.

items.label: No Skills Visibility
items.description: Live skills maps show who can code, sell or scale today. Match internals or externals to any role in seconds, not weeks of interviews.

items.label: Low Mobility
items.description: Stop losing great people to boredom. Our engine flags ready-to-grow insiders and fast-tracks them into open roles, cutting churn before it starts.

items.label: Poor Scalability
items.description: Headcount doubles overnight? Our cloud-native platform spins up thousands of requisitions, interviews and offers without extra headcount or hardware.

product.title: LeapIn turns workforce data into predictive intelligence —
product.subtitle: helping enterprises make better decisions across hiring, mobility, and leadership. We don’t track what happened.We predict what will happen.

items.title:
AI Talent
Acquisition
items.subtitle:
Predict who will succeed—
not just who looks good on paper.
items.description: Hire Success Probability predicts who will perform before day one, eliminating guesswork from hiring decisions.

items.title:
AI Talent
Marketplace
items.subtitle: Make internal talent your first hiring option.
items.description: Mobility Fit Score reveals hidden internal potential, turning reactive backfilling into predictive capability deployment.

items.title:
AI Talent
Development
items.subtitle: Build leadership pipelines with predictive certainty.
items.description: Promotion Success Probability validates leadership readiness early, replacing annual planning with continuous succession intelligence.

stats.title: Infrastructure-Level Returns
stats.subtitle: LeapIn turns talent data into measurable business outcomes.

cta.title: Turn Talent Into Your Competitive Advantage
cta.subtitle: See how LeapIn helps global enterprises make smarter talent decisions with AI.

hero.title: One
hero.subtitle: Predictive
hero.description:
From hiring to development to leadership
LeapIn moves beyond traditional HR systems to deliver predictive intelligence through a unified behavioral engine—embedding decision certainty into your existing infrastructure.

content.title: Predict who will succeed before day one.
content.description: Hire Success Probability uses behavioral signal processing to forecast on-the-job performance, eliminating guesswork from hiring decisions.

content.title: Turn internal mobility into strategic advantage.
content.description: Mobility Fit Score quantifies cross-role success potential, transforming talent deployment from reactive backfilling to proactive capability reallocation.

content.title: Build leadership pipelines with predictive certainty.
content.description: Promotion Success Probability and Succession Risk Index anticipate leadership outcomes before vacancies occur, aligning development with validated potential.

salesCoach.title: AI Sales Coach
salesCoach.subtitle: Scale winning sales behavior — faster.
salesCoach.description: Powered by LeapIn’s behavioral intelligence, AI Sales Coach helps sales teams ramp faster and perform consistently.

cta.title: Shared Intelligence Layer
cta.subtitle: All capabilities operate on a single behavioral prediction engine—ensuring hiring, mobility, and development decisions align around the same skills vectors and outcomes.

hero.title: AI
hero.subtitle: Solutions
hero.description: LeapIn helps enterprises solve their most critical workforce challenges with intelligence — not intuition.

section1.title: Hire Smarter
section1.description: Predict skills, potential, and fit with AI — faster and fairer.

section2.title: Mobilize Talent
section2.description: Unlock internal mobility and reduce external hiring dependency.

cta.title: Develop Faster
cta.subtitle: Build future-ready capabilities with precision and purpose.

hero.title: Industry-Specific
hero.subtitle: Intelligence.
hero.description: LeapIn’s AI models are tailored to the unique talent challenges of each industry.

cta.title: Why Industry-Specific AI Matters
cta.subtitle:
Each industry has distinct skill demands, talent risks, and regulatory realities.
LeapIn adapts its models to ensure relevance, accuracy, and impact.

hero.subtitle: Reinventing
hero.description: LeapIn was founded on a simple belief: Talent decisions should be intelligent, fair, and future-focused.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.info:
To help organizations see people clearly
— and unlock their full potential through AI.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.info: A world where skills, potential, and opportunity are visible — for everyone.

items.title: Teamwork
items.RespectInfo: LeapIn predicts skills, potential, and fit using behavioral AI — enabling faster, fairer, and more accurate hiring decisions at scale.
items.EmpathyInfo: We believe in building a world where EVERYONE has the opportunity to foresee their talent. We stand for all forms of diversity, including: culture, gender, opinion and race,and empathy is the core.
items.ContinuousGrowthInfo: In Leapln, we encourage innovation and accept mistakes.We know that no one is perfect, but the key is how we learn from mistakes quickly and keep growing.

items.title: Get Things Done
items.CustomerFirstInfo: Customer satisfaction is the greatest return to our work.We put customers’ needs first and help them to achieve the greatest success.
items.PromptResponseInfo: In a rapidly changing and high-tempo society, time is the biggest cost, We always adhere to the principle of immediate response regardless of the needs of colleagues or customers, We do it now and do it fast.
items.StriveForPerfectionInfo: The spirit of craftsmanship is what we admire, and we are constantly pursuing excellence both in products and services.

items.title: Al for Good
items.AlForGood:
Al for Good: Al must be embedded in human rights if we aim to build a fair and equitable society. We are being mindful of gender inequality, racial bias, and ethnic profiling with design of our products.

Leapln and all our engineers support the Beijing AlPrinciples that the development of artificial intelligence(Al) concerns the future of whole of society, all humankind, and the environment.
items.btn: Read the full set of principles

items.title: Have Fun
items.PassionInfo: 'Passion' brings all Leaplner together from all over the world. We love what we do, and we come to work each day inspired by knowing that we will positively impact another person's life.
items.BeBoldInfo: We are young, we dare to think big and take action. We are constantly pursuing personal development and bringing value to society.

team.title: You can’ t build great products without great people

card.title: THE TEAM
card.description: We're mission-driven, and we're an established, sustainable business in a fast paced industry that is full ofinteresting challenges and opportunities to grow, At Leapin, we believe 'Team Work' 'Get Things Done' 'HaveFun'We also believe in Talent, and everything we do is about Talent.Do meaningful things with us together!
card.cardInfo3:
Looking to take
your career leap
in to the next
level?
card.cardInfo6:
The LeapIn is
the perfect place for you!

position.title: Work With Us
position.subtitle: LeapIn is always looking for smart and passionate people to join our proud team
